title: worldpainter
description: World is your canvas! Create, Place & Color the world world how you'd imagine it!
body:
### Mr_Chibi's World Painter 🖌️

The world is your canvas! Create, Place, & Color the world how you'd imagine it!

## Why Should I install this into my world?

The pack is unique in its own way! - You can basicly create pretty world from scratch. - Who doesn't love keybinds with "no command" typing! - I've included some of my custom models into schematic brush, such as "Trees", "Mud Road Patterns", & some "Vanilla Schematics"! ## What features does it offer for players?

These tools can only be accessed by Server Operator or Given to player for preventions.
Varity of tools! Players can "paint", "select blocks, and "place" for example, "trees", "flowers", "biome painting", & much more etc.

- Tools that have keybind hotkeys example, pressing "F" key prompts tools. - Tools that change "paint brush" sizes from "small", "medium" & "big"! - Commands such as, "paint_outline", "paint_fill", "paint_cube", & "paint_hollow" have a min of 2" & max "23" example, "/trigger paint_fill set 23". Automaticly generates size player requests. - Players can create mountains, hills, or simple smoothen the surface using "sphere brush" & "smooth brush". If you like to read more information about the keybinds [[Click here]](https://github.com/mr-chibi/worldpainter/wiki/Hotkeys)

How it was written in:

  • Json
  • Mcfunction
